---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the BenchForge infrastructure.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run command '...'
2. Submit order '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Telemetry / Logs

If applicable, add output from structured JSON logs or screenshots from Grafana to help explain your problem.
```json
{ "level": "error", "msg": "..." }
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Go Version: [e.g. 1.22.0]
- Docker Version: [e.g. 24.0.5]
- Microservice: [e.g. telemetry-service, bot-worker]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., peak TPS during the issue).
